word: in my free time, I + V
example: In my free time, I listen to music and read books.
I spend my free time playing football with friends.
I am interested in photography and travelling.

vietnamese: mang lại hạnh phúc cho ai
example: This hobby brings happiness to me and my family.

vietnamese: khiến tôi thư giãn / vui hơn
example: Playing sports makes me relaxed after a long day.
Music helps reduce the stress of everyday hard work.
I take part in a football club at school.
Reading books broadens my knowledge about the world.

vietnamese: phát triển trí tưởng tượng và sáng tạo

word: be a good way to + V
example: Swimming is a good way to keep fit and stay healthy.
Listening to music helps me relax after studying.
Hiking is a popular outdoor activity.
Music is a great form of entertainment.
